g.text: n8n-style visualization · faithful to the implementation (Telegram bot + FastAPI + Next.js webapp + offer generator + schedulers)
LANE A · TELEGRAM AGENT (bot/handlers + shared/intent + shared/pending + shared/mutations)
LANE B · OFFER GENERATOR SLICE (web/oferty + api/routes/offers + shared/offers)
LANE D · AUTH + EXTERNAL SERVICE LEGEND
no Sheets write before Gmail OK
R1 INVARIANT · NO WRITE WITHOUT CONFIRMATION
Every mutation card uses [✅ Zapisać] [➕ Dopisać] [❌ Anulować].
❌ Anulować is one-click — no "na pewno?" loop.
Offer send uses [✅ Wysłać] [❌ Anulować]. [Tak]/[Nie] never confirms a write.
CRM source of truth = Google (Sheets / Calendar / Drive / Gmail). System data = Supabase. Bot delegates business logic to shared/* — handlers stay thin.
